timeline.title: The First Trip
timeline.description: A small group of 6 strangers hiked Skandagiri. That night, a community was born.

timeline.title: Crossing 50 Trips
timeline.description: We curated experiences across Karnataka and Kerala — from misty hills to hidden coves.

timeline.title: 300+ Travelers Strong
timeline.description: A real community of working professionals who trust us with their weekends.

timeline.title: Hidden Gems Series
timeline.description: We launched our signature offbeat trails — places no tourist map will ever show.

timeline.title: Going Cinematic
timeline.description: Every trip now comes with a curated photo & film story. Your memories, beautifully captured.

timeline.title: 500+ Stories Created
timeline.description: Half a thousand professionals. One unforgettable weekend at a time.

memories.caption: When the rain stopped, the sky gave us this.
Climbed at midnight. Watched the sunrise above the clouds.
Bonfire, guitar, ocean. Strangers became family.
Walking through ruins built by emperors.
The tea hills woke up before we did.
First trip of the year. Best one yet.
Rappelled down. Made memories that won't fade.
The pine forest felt like another planet.
